citations: POL-2024-001: Enterprise Expense Management Policy v3.0, effective 2024-01-01 to 2024-12-31
POL-2023-001: Enterprise Expense Management Policy v2.0, effective 2023-01-01 to 2023-12-31
POL-2022-001: Enterprise Expense Management Policy v1.0, effective 2022-01-01 to 2022-12-31
key_findings: POL-2024-001 (Enterprise Expense Management Policy v3.0) is the sole applicable policy for the 2024 calendar year, effective 2024-01-01 through 2024-12-31.
POL-2022-001 (v1.0) was superseded by POL-2023-001 (v2.0) effective 2023-01-01 and is excluded from 2024 applicability.
POL-2023-001 (v2.0) was superseded by POL-2024-001 (v3.0) effective 2024-01-01 and is excluded from 2024 applicability.
The linear version chain is: v1.0 (POL-2022-001) → v2.0 (POL-2023-001) → v3.0 (POL-2024-001), with clean transitions on January 1 of each respective year.
Five key clauses govern expense audits in 2024: meal allowance (4.1), accommodation (4.2), transportation (4.3), approval thresholds (5), and special approvals (6).
No policy conflicts or unresolved items were identified across the version chain.
